achievements.title: Treetop Romp
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board against 3 CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Treetop Triumph
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Treetop Titan
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board against 3 Brutal difficulty CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Treetop Explorer
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board against 3 Normal or higher difficulty CPUs, ensuring you encounter every space, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: WAAAAAACHOOOO!!!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, tickle the tree and have all of your opponents fall to a lower level
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Hi There!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, encounter Woody during the day and shower everyone with coins
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: That'll Teach You Not to Bother Me!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, encounter Woody during the night and have all three of your opponents lose coins
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Teehee...I'll Be Right Back!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, have Pink Boo steal a star for you
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Fluff Airlines
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, take flight with Fluff Airlines and have them take you to the highest level of the board
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: That Is, Like, SO Unfair!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, prevent Boo from stealing from you by utilising a Boo-Away orb
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: That's It, It's Time to Throw Down!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, win a duel which you did not initiate
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Ok, Here We Go!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, use a Flutter orb to be transported to the star space and purchase a star
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Lets-a-Do the Star Warp!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board as P1, use a Warp orb to swap places with a character who is within 5 spaces leading up to the star
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: We Have Hit the Big Time!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board against 3 CPUs, collect a total of 60 coins from any single opponent using your Goomba or Spiny orbs, without loading an in-progress save
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Orb Investor
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Towering Treetop board against 3 CPUs, spend 100 coins or more buying orbs, without loading an in-progress save
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Garage Glory
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board against 3 CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Garage Triumph
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Garage Titan
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board against 3 Brutal difficulty CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Garage Explorer
achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board against 3 Normal or higher difficulty CPUs, ensuring you visit every space, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Extreme Coin Suckage Initiated!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board as P1, steal 15 or more coins in a single use of the Wealth Suckage Apparatus
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Behold the Fury of the Glorious Calamity Launcher!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board as P1, pay E. Gadd enough to launch all 5 orbs from the Calamity Launcher
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: My Shuffle-O-Tron Never Fails!
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board as P1, place 3 orbs into E. Gadd's Shuffle-O-Tron at the same time and receive new orbs

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board as P1, morph any number of orbs in E. Gadd's Orb Morpher and gain some coins
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board as P1, clear two opponents' character spaces in a single use of the Metal Mushroom orb
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board as P1, have an opponent trigger your Piranha Plant and steal at least 50 coins from them

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on E. Gadd's Garage board as P1, place a Klepto orb on the space preceding the star and have an opponent trigger it, sending them back to the starting space

achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Faire Square board against 3 Normal or higher difficulty CPUs, ensuring you visit every space, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Faire Square board as P1, purchase 5 stars during a single visit to the star space

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Faire Square board as P1, participate in the Star Shuffle game during the night and pick the correct hat to earn 3 stars

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Faire Square board as P1, have the Swap Fest trigger during the day and win the contest

achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.title: Toady Trap
achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Faire Square board as P1, steal an orb from an opponent by having them trigger your Toady orb
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Snowflake Lake board against 3 CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set

achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Snowflake Lake board against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Snowflake Lake board against 3 Brutal difficulty CPUs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set

achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Snowflake Lake board against 3 Normal or higher difficulty CPUs, ensuring you visit every space on foot, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set
achievements.author: TeddyWestside

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Snowflake Lake board as P1, ride a Chain Chomp and steal 3 stars in a single ride

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Snowflake Lake board as P1, steal 10 stars over the course of a game by utilising the Chain Chomps, without loading an in-progress save

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Snowflake Lake board as P1, trigger the snowball fight event on your turn and earn at least 10 coins

achievements.description: Win a Party mode Battle Royale on the Castaway Bay board against 3 Normal or higher difficulty CPUs, ensuring you visit every space, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Castaway Bay board as P1, ride the raft

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Castaway Bay board as P1, trigger the Coin Catch event during your turn and finish with at least 20 coins gathered

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Castaway Bay board as P1, worship at the Mushroom Spirit and be awarded an orb

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Castaway Bay board as P1, have Pink Boo steal coins from each of your opponents over the course of a game, without loading an in-progress save

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Clockwork Castle board as P1, summon a UFO to transport you to the starting space

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale on the Clockwork Castle board as P1, change night to day with the Cosmic Time Wheel when Bowser is within four spaces of the Cosmic Time Wheel

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale against 3 CPUs, be awarded the Mini-game Star bonus by winning the most coins in mini-games, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set

achievements.description: In a Party mode Battle Royale against 3 CPUs, be awarded the Orb Star bonus by using the most orbs, without loading an in-progress save and with no handicaps set

achievements.description: In Solo mode, earn at least half (rounded up) of the available bonuses, excluding mic bonuses
